name: @monet/desktop
description: Monet as a transparent, always-on-top desktop being. An Electron shell over the whiteroom app's /desktop route (overlay mode), with a BYOK brain (your own Anthropic key, held only in the main process).

scripts.build:native: swiftc -O ax/monet-axread.swift -o ax/monet-axread && swiftc -O ocr/monet-ocr.swift -o ocr/monet-ocr
scripts.postinstall: node -e "process.exit(process.platform==='darwin'?0:1)" && (npm run build:native || echo 'note: swiftc not found — macOS screen-read helpers not built (everything else works)') || echo 'note: screen-read is macOS-only for now — skipped on this platform (the shell + render + BYOK brain still run; see screenread/README.md)'
